content.full_text:
FPPC 712 Adelynn Dr
SEP 27 2:18 PM '90 San Gabriel, Cal
91775

Fair Pol. Prac. Comm.

The confusion caused by a
notice referring to a new senator,
but not naming him is ridiculous.

The writers of Prop73 surely
need, but please try to fix
the naming, or omit notices.

Also please note, I live in
Cal., not Canada.

yours truly
Edward Moore

[The image appears to be a very faint or low-contrast scanned document. While there is clearly text present, it is too faded and illegible to accurately transcribe the specific words and content. The document appears to have multiple paragraphs, but the text is not readable enough to provide a verbatim transcription that would meet the accuracy requirements specified.]
